title: thelypteris womersleyi
intro: Thelypteris womersleyi, also known as the womersley's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indigenous Australian medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris womersleyi include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and aid in recovery from illness.
